title: Best Pet Camera Under $30 (Budget Picks That Work)
meta: Functional, affordable pet cameras for tight budgets — what you get and what you give up.
intro: You can watch your pet for under $30, but expect trade-offs in app reliability and video clarity. We found the ones that don't frustrate.

sections.body: Fewer features, sometimes weaker night vision, and apps with more ads or lag.
Quick check-ins and basic motion alerts — fine if you don't need treat tossing.
Stick to recognizable brands with recent reviews to dodge dead apps.

faq.a: Reputable budget brands are fine; avoid unknown apps requesting excess permissions.
Most budget cams work free for live view.
